commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh 1 Chronicles 1:51 Hadad died also. And the chiefs of Edom were; chief Timnah, chief Aliah, chief Jetheth, Kings. Hebrew, "Adad also died, and the dukes of Edom were duke Thamna (Haydock) This, and the following names, designate the place of their residence. (Menochius) The same forms of government prevailed in Idumea, as among the Hebrews, who had judges or dukes, then kings, and, after the captivity, dukes, till the time of the Machabees.
